assertion_results.text: The structural summary or reductive findings note the assertion change in test_recommend_purls_basic — the PURL assertion changed from checking a fully qualified PURL with qualifiers to checking a versioned PURL without qualifiers, which the semantic assessment may identify as a relaxation contributing to the MIXED classification
assertion_results.evidence: report.md lines 76-84: 'Relaxed assertion in `test_recommend_purls_basic` -- The base-branch assertion checked the full PURL string including qualifiers: `pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12?repository_url=https://repo1.maven.org&type=jar` The PR-branch assertion checks only the versioned PURL: `pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12` This is an assertion relaxation -- the test now accepts a less specific value.' This is explicitly listed under 'Reductive Signals' and contributes to the MIXED classification.
